text.content: Point 4 clarified by Ken 2026-05-07: Review our existing backlog (TKTs and US driving current work) against the newly loaded strategy roadmap (ainchors-strategy-okr-2026-05.md). Are we working on the right things? Map each open TKT to a pillar + OKR ID. Surface items that have no OKR linkage (candidates to park or re-scope). Surface OKR gaps where no TKT exists yet (new work to raise). Output: re-prioritised backlog aligned to strategy.
